# Architecture Blueprint

<!-- mol:map:managed begin -->
<!-- This block is regenerated by /mol:map. Custom annotations go
     OUTSIDE these markers and are preserved across re-runs. -->

_Generated 2026-05-29 by /mol:map._

## Inventory (monorepo)

Workspace root declares npm workspaces `["core", "page", "vsc-ext"]`; `python/` is a non-npm member that bundles `page/dist/`. `page/` and `vsc-ext/` consume `@molcrafts/molvis-core` from source (tsconfig `paths` + rsbuild alias); core's `dist/` is npm-publish only. External binary dependency: `@molcrafts/molrs` (WASM Frame/Block/Box/WasmArray + PCA/k-means). Below, `core/` is enumerated in depth; the three host packages are summarized at the package level.

### Module list

**Top-level orchestrators (`core/src/*.ts`)**
- `app.ts` — `MolvisApp`, the public orchestrator wiring all subsystems
- `world.ts` — BabylonJS scene/camera/lights/post-processing context
- `system.ts` — pure data layer; owns Trajectory + frame navigation, emits frame/trajectory events
- `artist.ts` — graphics engine; frame data → GPU thin instances; owns singleton atom/bond base meshes
- `scene_index.ts` — entity registry (`ImpostorState`, `MetaRegistry`) managing per-instance GPU buffer segments
- `scene_sync.ts`, `selection_reconciler.ts` — reconcile scene/selection state after pipeline runs
- `picker.ts` — ID-pass off-screen picking (mesh+instance encoded into color)
- `highlighter.ts`, `target_indicator.ts`, `axis_helper.ts` — visual feedback meshes
- `thin_instance.ts`, `entity_source.ts` — thin-instance buffer plumbing and entity feed
- `frame_render_scheduler.ts` — batches/schedules render passes
- `settings.ts`, `config.ts`, `viewport_settings.ts` — config/settings models
- `events.ts` — type-safe `EventEmitter` + `MolvisEventMap`
- `selection_manager.ts` — `SelectionManager`, selection state
- `data_inspector.ts` — column/row discovery for tabular data
- `grid.ts` — volumetric grid rendering, `save_file.ts`, `dom_helpers.ts`, `version.ts`

**`algo/`** — `marching_cubes.ts` (isosurface extraction)
**`analysis/`** — `rdf`, `cluster`, `cluster_properties`, `msd`, `rings`, `topology_analysis`, `exploration` (PCA/k-means), `utils`
**`artist/`** — `atom_buffer`, `bond_buffer`, `material_factory`, `material_spec`, `palette`, `representation`, `style_manager`, `theme`, `label_renderer`, `visual_guide`, `warmup`; `presets/` (`classic`, `modern`); `ribbon/` (`spline`, `backbone_block`, `pdb_backbone`, `ribbon_geometry`, `ribbon_renderer`)
**`charts/`** — `bar_chart`, `line_chart`, `scatter_chart`, `gantt_chart`, `raw_chart`, `plotly_loader`, `theme`, `types`, `index` (subpath export `./charts`)
**`commands/`** — `base` (`Command`, `@command`), `registry`, `manager`, `composite`; command classes: `draw`, `clear`, `frame`, `selection`, `attributes`, `snapshot`, `representation`, `overlays`, `mark_atom`, `place_molecule`; `sources` (frame sources); `index` (`registerDefaultCommands`)
**`io/`** — `formats` (dependency-free format registry), `reader`, `writer`, `normalize_coords`, `zarr`, `index` (`loadFileContent` canonical file ingress; subpath exports `./io`, `./io/formats`)
**`mode/`** — `base` (`BaseMode`, `ModeType`), `view`, `select`, `edit`, `manipulate`, `measure`, `menu_items`, `utils`, `types`, `index` (`ModeManager`, `KEY_TO_MODE`)
**`modifiers/`** — `DataSourceModifier` (in `pipeline/`), `SliceModifier`, `ExpressionSelectionModifier`, `SelectModifier`, `HideSelectionModifier`, `HideHydrogensModifier`, `TransparentSelectionModifier`, `DeleteSelectedModifier`, `AssignColorModifier`, `ColorByPropertyModifier`, `VectorFieldModifier`, `WrapPBCModifier`
**`overlays/`** — `overlay_manager`, `arrow3d`, `arrow2d`, `text_label`, `vector_field`, `mark_atom`, `types`
**`pipeline/`** — `pipeline` (`ModifierPipeline`), `modifier` (`BaseModifier`, categories), `modifier_registry`, `data_source_modifier` (the single ingress), `rendering_modifiers`, `nato_ids` (DAG id utils), `registry`, `types` (`SelectionMask`, context)
**`selection/`** — `expression` (selection-language parser), `fence` (polygon/lasso geometry)
**`shaders/`** — `impostor` (impostor GLSL)
**`system/`** — `trajectory` (`Trajectory`, `FrameProvider`), `topology`, `frame_diff` (position vs full transition), `frame_labels` (descriptor aggregation), `elements`, `index` (re-exports molrs types)
**`transport/`** — `ws_bridge`, `event_forwarder`, `state_sync`, `index` (`attachWebSocketBridge`); `rpc/` (`router` — JSON-RPC dispatch + `ensureDataSource`/`ingestFramesIntoPipeline`, `serialization`, `types`)
**`ui/`** (core's vanilla UI primitives) — `manager`, `builder`, `base`, `styles`, `types`; `components/` (`button`, `slider`, `folder`, `separator`); `panels/` (`info`, `mode`, `perf`, `trajectory`, `view`); `menus/` (`context_menu`, `controller`, `registry`)
**`utils/`** — `bbox`, `dom`, `dtype`, `image_crop`, `logger`, `platform`
**`types/`** — `wasm-inline.d.ts`

**Host packages**
- `page/` (`page`, React 19) — `App.tsx`, `MolvisWrapper.tsx`, `mount.tsx`/`mount-opts.ts`, `public-path.ts`; `components/` (`ErrorBoundary`, `TimelineControl`, `format-picker-dialog`); `hooks/` (`useBackendConnection`, `useBackendStateSync`, `useHostFileBridge`, `useMolvisUiState`, `useStatusMessage`, `useTheme`); `lib/`, `ui/layout`, `ui/modes` (sidebar tabs incl. `edit/`), `dev/`, `styles/`
- `vsc-ext/` (`molvis`) — `extension.ts` + `extension/` (`activate`, `configuration`, `types`, `loading/`, `panels/`); `viewer/` (custom editor controller); `webview/` (`controller`, `errorBoundary`, `index`)
- `python/` (`molcrafts-molvis`, PyPI) — `scene.py`, `control.py`, `events.py`, `palettes.py`, `video.py`, `errors.py`, `types.py`, `utils.py`, `transport_base.py`; `transport/` (`websocket`, `_codec`, `_jupyter_env`); `commands/` (`catalog`, `drawing`, `frame`, `overlay`, `pipeline`, `selection`, `snapshot`, `palette`); `dist/` (bundled `page/`)

### Public surface

- **`.` (`core/src/index.ts`)** — `mountMolvis()`, `MolvisApp` (as `Molvis`), `MOLVIS_VERSION`; config/settings (`defaultMolvisConfig`, `DEFAULT_CONFIG`, `Settings`, `DEFAULT_SETTING`, `defaultMolvisSettings`); system/WASM re-exports (`Frame`, `Block`, `Box`, `WasmArray`, `MolRecReader`, `SDFReader`, `Trajectory`, `parseSMILES`, `generate3D`, `WasmPca2`, `WasmPcaResult`, `WasmKMeans`, `Topology`, `System`, `World`); selection (`SelectionManager`, `parseSelectionKey`); modes (`ModeType`); pipeline (`ModifierPipeline`, `PipelineEvents`, `ModifierRegistry`, `ModifierCategory`, `Modifier`, `SelectionMask`, `nextModifierId`, `isSelectionProducer`, `isTopologyChanging`, `DataSourceModifier`); frame sources (`ArrayFrameSource`, `ZarrFrameSource`); all built-in modifiers (`SliceModifier`, `ExpressionSelectionModifier`, `HideSelectionModifier`, `AssignColorModifier`, `ColorByPropertyModifier`, `DeleteSelectedModifier`, `HideHydrogensModifier`, `TransparentSelectionModifier`, `SelectModifier`, `VectorFieldModifier`); palette/color (`ColorMap`, `getColorMap`, `listColorMaps`, palette helpers); analysis (`computeRdf`, `runExploration`, `computeClusters`, `computeMsd`/`MsdAnalyzer`, `computeClusterProperties`, `detectRings`, `analyzeTopology`); data inspector; `EventEmitter` + event types; selection geometry (`pointInPolygon`, `simplifyPolyline`); artist (`LabelRenderer`, `ClassicTheme`, `ModernTheme`, `REPRESENTATIONS`/`BALL_AND_STICK`/`SPACEFILL`/`STICK`/`findRepresentation`, `RepresentationStyle`); overlays (`OverlayManager` + 5 overlay classes + types); overlay/mark commands; `registerDefaultCommands`, `registerDefaultModifiers`; image crop utils; transport (`attachWebSocketBridge`, `applyBackendState`, `WebSocketBridge`, `EventForwarder`, `RPCRouter` + JSON-RPC/serialized-frame types)
- **`./io`** — `loadFileContent` (canonical ingress), `readFrames`, `FILE_FORMAT_REGISTRY`, `inferFormatFromFilename`, `getAllAcceptExtensions`, `describeFormat`, `loadZarrFiles`, `writeFrame`/`exportFrame`/`writeXYZFrame`/`writePDBFrame`/`writeLAMMPSData`, `FileContent`/`FileFormat` types
- **`./io/formats`** — dependency-free subset: `FileFormat`, `FileFormatDescriptor`, `FILE_FORMAT_REGISTRY` (importable without Babylon/WASM, used by vsc-ext activation bundle)
- **`./charts`** — `BarChart`, `LineChart`, `ScatterChart`, `GanttChart`, `RawChart`, chart theme + config types (NOT re-exported from `.` — tree-shake invariant)
- **`commands/index.ts`** (internal barrel) — `Command`, `@command`, `commands`/`CommandRegistry`, all command classes, `registerDefaultCommands`; side-effect imports register every command at load (mirrors `package.json` `sideEffects` allowlist for `./commands/*`)
- **`python/molvis`** — `Molvis`/`Scene`/`Control` Python-side façade mirroring the `scene.*`/`view.*`/`selection.*`/`pipeline.*`/`snapshot.*` RPC families

### Style summary

- **Naming** — modifier files are `PascalCaseModifier.ts` (class-per-file); commands are `snake_case.ts` grouped by domain with `PascalCaseCommand` classes; analysis/io/system modules are `snake_case.ts` exporting `computeX`/`runX` functions + result interfaces. Acronyms uppercase everywhere (PDB, XYZ, RDF, WASM, RPC, PCA).
- **Construction patterns** — commands register via `@command("name")` decorator at module load (side-effect imports in `commands/index.ts`); modifiers register via `ModifierRegistry` + `nextModifierId`/NATO-id factories (`registerDefaultModifiers`); materials/themes via factory modules (`material_factory`, `theme`, presets); WASM-backed types come exclusively from `@molcrafts/molrs` re-exported through `system/index`.
- **Error handling** — analysis/transport functions free WASM handles in `finally`; ingress validates format at `io` boundary; no defensive blanket try-catch in source (per house style). Inputs validated at system boundaries (`io`, `transport/rpc`).
- **Immutability** — modifiers are pure `apply(frame, ctx) → new Frame`; all data transforms return new objects, never mutate. WASM handle ownership is strict: never free shared `getBlock`/`simbox` handles; only free `WasmArray` results and owned `Frame`s.

### Layer roles (per `core-arch.md` + CLAUDE.md invariants)

- **Rendering (World/Babylon)** — `world.ts`, `artist.ts`, `scene_index.ts`, `picker.ts`, `highlighter.ts`, `target_indicator.ts`, `axis_helper.ts`, `thin_instance.ts`, `entity_source.ts`, `frame_render_scheduler.ts`, `grid.ts`, `shaders/`, `algo/`
- **Artist / representation** — `artist/` (buffers, materials, palette, representation, style_manager, themes, ribbon, labels, visual_guide)
- **Data layer** — `system.ts`, `system/` (Trajectory, topology, frame_diff, frame_labels, elements); `analysis/`, `data_inspector.ts` are pure compute consumers of frame data
- **Command layer** — `commands/`; `do()`/`undo()` symmetry required for every reversible op. **Invariant: `DrawFrameCommand` = full rebuild; `UpdateFrameCommand` = in-place buffer update only and must never call `sceneIndex.registerFrame()`**
- **Mode layer** — `mode/` (View/Select/Edit/Manipulate/Measure, keys 1–5 via `KEY_TO_MODE`); Edit uses staging pool pattern
- **Pipeline (single data ingress)** — `pipeline/` + `modifiers/`. **Invariant: all scene-data loads funnel through `DataSourceModifier` at the pipeline head** (`io.loadFileContent` and `transport/rpc/router.ensureDataSource` are the only ingress paths; never bypass)
- **RPC / transport** — `transport/` + `transport/rpc/`. `RPCRouter` dispatches `scene.*`/`view.*`/`selection.*`/`snapshot.*`/`pipeline.*`; GUI and RPC are co-equal views onto the same `ModifierPipeline`
- **UI** — core `ui/` (vanilla panels/menus/components) is the in-canvas/control UI; React sidebar UI lives in `page/`; selection geometry (`selection/fence`, `expression`) supports interactive selection
- **Public-API / tree-shake invariants** — `core/src/index.ts` must NOT re-export from `./charts`; subpath exports `./io`, `./io/formats`, `./charts` are stable public API; `io/formats` must stay dependency-free (no Babylon/WASM/logger)
- **Host layers** — `page/` = single React 19 frontend for all hosts (app vs library role: app); `vsc-ext/` = VSCode custom-editor host (tooling/app); `python/` = controller library driving the page bundle over WebSocket (library)

<!-- mol:map:managed end -->
